skills.name: Bodkin Point
skills.description: Apply [Bodkin Point] buff to the character when this skill is not during cooldown.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2
Ignores enemy Physical Defense by 25%

skills.name: Barbed Arrow
skills.description: Apply [Barbed Arrow] buff to the character when this skill is not during cooldown.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 5
Ignore 25% of enemy's Evasion

skills.name: Crossfire
skills.description: Apply [Crossfire] to the character if this skill is not during cooldown.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor %
Number of targets in the horizontal area CaptionRatio2
Number of targets in the vertical area CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Divine Machine Arrow
skills.description: Apply [Divine Machine Arrow] buff to the character when this skill is not during cooldown.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 3 times
Inflict damage every 0.4 seconds
Skill Range 35
AoE Attack Ratio SkillSR

skills.name: Fletcher Arrow Shot
skills.description: {#005060}Activates when one or more Fletcher Arrow buff is in possession
skills.effect_text:
Skill Range: MaxR
Skill Factor of All Fletcher Arrow + SkillFactor %

skills.name: Catena Chain Arrow
skills.description: Connect your body with the installed arrow by firing a chain arrow at the designated location.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor %
Range 200
Duration 20 second
Number of Targets CaptionRatio

attributes.name: Bodkin Point: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Bodkin Point] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Catena Chain Arrow: Promised Hit
attributes.description:
* Number of Target changed to 1

* Ignore the target's Evasion and Block. Accurately hit at all times

attributes.name: [Arts] Catena Chain Arrow: Haken Leap
attributes.description:
* Duration of installing the arrow decreases by 5 seconds

* When the installation is removed by using the skill again, the character leaps to the location of the connected arrow

attributes.name: [Arts] Crossfire: Portfire
attributes.description:
* Cooldown increases by 5 seconds

* Pulls the target hit to the center of the skill range

* Target Stunned for 2 seconds
